title: The DELPH-IN Grammary: a Curated Repository of Grammars and Treebanks
description: A curated collection of DELPH-IN grammars and treebanks, made as accessible as possible. Grammars are processed with the Linguistic Type Database (LTDB) and can be browsed and parsed interactively at https://compling.upol.cz/ltdb.
references: Francis Bond and Dan Flickinger (2026). The DELPH-IN Grammary: a Curated Repository of Grammars and Treebanks. In 15th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2026).
